title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist AI system automates medical research discovery, identifying new treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss. Robin is an agent system that uses consensus mechanisms to rank and validate scientific findings across multiple discovery domains.
